steps.description: Click on the "Apps for Microsoft 365" option in the dropdown menu under "New Project" to select it.
Click on the "Other Teams Capabilities" dropdown option within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" selector.
Click on the dropdown option labeled "A simple implementation of a web app that's ready to customize" within the "Teams Capability" selection menu.
Click on the "Default folder" dropdown in the workspace setup dialog to select or specify the root folder location for the project.
